prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（原理科）最低位次分别为约50842、34386、34767、35066、36486名，2021年位次异常偏高，2022年起稳定在3.4万–3.6万区间；2025年基准 约36486名，较2024年小幅后移约1420名；本省物理类计划2021年14人、2022年12人、2023年11人、2024年7人、2025年6人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计 划大幅增至21人（含国家专项计划），较2025年扩招250%，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第177名，较2025年（第 180名）小幅上升，层次定位稳定；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及排球联赛主场争议事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音综合热度排名第18 （高热），短视频曝光量大，反映学校在年轻群体中关注度较高，对报考热度有一定正向拉动；体育学为该校核心优势学科（第五轮评估A+），但本轮评估数据 中未收录该校具体学科等级，无法逐一映射招生专业；体育类院校特色鲜明，对体育特长考生有专属吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年河南省普通高考考生总数约120万人 ，较2025年历史类+物理类合计约90.7万人显著增加，竞争整体加剧；该校位于北京，对河南考生具有 一定跨省吸引力；物理类2026年大幅扩招至21人，招生规模显著扩大，位次波动受扩招效应主导。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类近年位次稳定在3.4万–3.6万区间、2026年招生计 划从6人扩至21人（扩招250%）、全省考生总量大幅增加等因素，扩招效应远大于考生增量带来的竞争加剧，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将大幅后移；预测最低位次约91015名 ，区间90515–91515名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (formerly Science) were approximately 50842, 34386, 34767, 35066, and 36486 respectively. The 2021 ranking was abnormally high, while from 2022 onward it stabilized in the 34,000–36,000 range. The 2025 baseline is approximately 36486, a slight drop of about 1420 places compared to 2024. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 6 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 21 (including National Special Plan slots), a 250% expansion over 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 177th, a slight rise from 180th in 2025, indicating a stable level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to controversies surrounding the volleyball league home games, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting strong attention among young people and a positive pull on application heat. Sports Science is its core advantageous discipline (A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), but the specific discipline grades are not included in this round of evaluation data, making it impossible to map to enrollment majors one by one. As a sports-focused university, it has a unique appeal to candidates with sports talents.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from the combined total of approximately 907,000 for History and Physics Categories in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Located in Beijing, the university has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Henan candidates. In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment expands significantly to 21, greatly increasing the scale, and ranking fluctuations are dominated by the expansion effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 34,000–36,000 for Physics Category in recent years, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion from 6 to 21 (250% increase), and the substantial increase in the total number of provincial candidates, the expansion effect far outweighs the intensified competition from the candidate increase. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will drop significantly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 91015, with a range of 90515–91515.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category significantly expands enrollment to 21, with a ranking range of 90515–91515. Candidates near the lower end of the range can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Rehabilitation Physical Therapy. Those in the middle range should prioritize Tier 2 majors like Sports Rehabilitation, Applied Psychology, English, and Sports Human Science. Candidates near the upper end can use Tier 3 majors such as Sports Economics and Management, Intelligent Sports Engineering, and various National Special Plan majors as safety options. After the expansion, admission opportunities have increased significantly. It is recommended that candidates choose based on their own rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans

The 2025 baseline is about 5105, an increase of about 571 from 2024. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 3 in 2025, decreasing significantly each year. The 2026 plan remains at 3, unchanged from 2025, and is already at a very low level, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 177th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, a slight rise from 180th in 2025, indicating a stable level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to controversies surrounding the volleyball league home court incident, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high attention among younger groups and positively influencing application heat. Sports science is the university's core advantageous discipline (A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), but specific discipline grades are not included in this round of evaluation data, making it impossible to map to enrollment majors one by one. The sports university has distinctive characteristics, attracting candidates with sports expertise.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Henan Province general college entrance examination candidates is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from the combined total of about 907,000 for History and Physics categories in 2025, intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Henan candidates. The History Category enrollment plan is only 3, a very small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations highly susceptible to the application behavior of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating but advancing trend of History Category rankings in recent years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province leading to intensified competition, and the increased attention from Douyin's high heat, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly advance from the 2025 baseline of 5105. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5055, with a range of 4555 to 5555.
